## Result Summary

- **Agent:** <!-- e.g., CovenantProphetAgent -->
- **Agent file:** <!-- e.g., agents/covenant_prophet.py -->
- **Model:** <!-- e.g., Claude Opus 4.7 -->
- **Benchmark:** <!-- e.g., Terminal-Bench 2.0 -->
- **Tasks:** <!-- e.g., 89 -->
- **Score:** <!-- e.g., 67.4% -->
- **Retry enabled:** <!-- yes/no -->

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 + WSL2 -->
- **Docker RAM:** <!-- e.g., 8GB -->
- **Harbor version:** <!-- e.g., v0.6.3 -->
- **Python version:** <!-- e.g., 3.11.8 -->
